title: Origins: Rockeater
description: Origin datapack that adds the Rockeater, a small creature that can only eat stone
body:
## 🪨 Rockeater 🪨
The Rockeater is a small, goblin-like creature that can only eat stone, with eyesight more fitted to the darkness of the caves.

Depending on the type of mineral you digest, there may be some extra benefits!

❗**Requires Pehkui (for size power)**

## ✨Powerlist✨

<details>
<summary>Rock Eater</summary>

You have a strong jaw that allows you to eat rocks.
Depending on what type of rock it is, you might get some special benefits :)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Dark Vision</summary>

You can see slightly better in the dark.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Skilled Blacksmith</summary>

You can mend any object in your mainhand every 10 minutes by pressing your primary key.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Cave Miner</summary>

Pickaxes do almost as much damage as an axe.

</details>

<details>
<summary>One-block Sized</summary>

You're only one block tall. Perfect to go mining!

</details>

<details>
<summary>Liquid Poison</summary>

You can't properly handle water inside your digestive system.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Rock Eater</summary>

You can't eat organic food.

</details>

## Modpack Development

<details>
<summary>Tags</summary>

- `blocks`
  - `bright`: Blocks that emit a light and cause blindness.
  - `can_be_lit`: Blocks emit light and cause blindness but only when the `"lit"` property is `true`.
- `items`
  - `onlystone`: Rocks that can be eaten.
  - `pickaxes`: Pickaxes that get a damage buff.

</details>
